SEARCH
Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.voteshop.shop

Class VoteShopLoader

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.voteshop.shop.VoteShopLoader
public class VoteShopLoader extends Object
Loads vote shop data from ShopFile.
